column1: I want to go to Japan.
column3: にほんにいきたいです。
column5: V-たい: first-person desire — I want to do X; speaker's wish

column5: V-たい vs ほしい: want-to vs want-it — たい = want to do; ほしい = want the thing

column1: I want to go home early today.

column5: V-たい: NOT for third person — use たがる or と思っている for others
